name: Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II
business: Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or acquisition with one or more businesses, with a focus on fintech, enterprise, deep tech, and health-tech industries. As of the filing, it has no operations and nominal assets consisting almost entirely of cash. It has entered into a business combination agreement with Ace Green Recycling, Inc., but has not yet completed any business combination.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue an acquisition in any business industry or sector, we intend to focus our efforts identifying businesses in the fintech, enterprise, deep tech and health-tech industries.

catalysts.sentence: Our amended and restated certificate of incorporation provides that we will have until June 14, 2026, to complete our initial business combination.
